title: Hi res movie poster IMAGE FILES
display_title: Hi res movie poster IMAGE FILES
wikitext:
[]: Hi-res (movie/poster) IMAGE FILES             Quote Post by vincent-mq » Mon Jul 01, 2013 2:53 am Per recommendation of someone from this forum, I'm going to make my own posters instead of gamblig with ebay quality posters! I've saved a few nicely sized images but would like MOAARR. Here's a quick screenie of what I have saved so far: http://tinypic.com/r/1fd6wh/5 I'm particularly looking for the hi-res Japanese movie posters. ESPECIALLY 3.0, like the one I have, but with the text and 'Q'. And the End of Evangelion one with Shinji, Asuka, Rei, and Suzuhara standing on the mound?

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Jul 01, 2013 7:19 am Is there really no place to buy official theatrical posters of 1.0 - 3.0? I've been meaning to pick them up for a while.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Jul 01, 2013 10:18 am These are not the same by any means, but there are mini versions of movie posters called eiga chirashi , size B5. Much more portable and I store mine in a binder. JMShop , who I recommend, still has 1 from D&R and a couple from 1.0 and 2.0, although they are sold out of 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Jul 01, 2013 1:06 pm Why does that one pic have Mari with NGE version of Eva-02?

[]:             Quote Post by vincent-mq » Mon Jul 01, 2013 4:22 pm I've heard of the Chirashi posters and I'll probably buy some, or make some if the resolution on some of my favorite images are too small. I'm going to plaster these all over my walls, so the bigger the better!
